data.project_name: Sindh Early Learning Enhancement through Classroom Transformation
data.bid_description: Procurement of Printing Services for 295 Newly Constructed Schools and 885 Feeder Schools
data.contact_address: Reform Support Unit, N.J.V. School Building, 1st Floor, M.A. Jinnah Road, Karachi, Pakistan

data.notice_text:
Country: Islamic Republic of Pakistan

Name of Project: World Bank Funded Sindh Early Learning Enhancement Through Classroom Transformation, Government of Sindh Education & Literacy Department, Project Management and Implementation Unit (PMIU) of reform support unit (RSU).

Contract Title: Procurement of Printing Services in 295 Newly Constructed Schools & 885 Feeder Schools Under SELECT Project

Loan No./Credit No./ Grant No.: IDA-69730 TF No: B6208/B7208-PK

RFB Reference No: PK-RSU-SINDH-550143-GO-RFQ

 

1. The Government of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, through Government of Sindh (hereinafter called “Borrower”) financing from the World Bank toward the cost of the SELECT Project and intends to apply part of the proceeds toward payments under the contract for the Procurement of Printing Services in 295 Newly Constructed Schools & 885 Feeder Schools Under SELECT Project.

2. The Project Implementation Unit (PMIU) SELECT, Reform Support Unit (RSU), School Education & Literacy Department (SE&LD), Government of Sindh now invites sealed Quotations from eligible service provider for the Procurement of Printing Services in 295 Newly Constructed Schools & 885 Feeder Schools Under SELECT Project.

3.Interested bidders/Suppliers are required to submit their quotations based on the specifications and terms and conditions outlined in the Request for Quotation (RFQ) document. The RFQ document can be obtained by free downloading from the website http://rsu-sindh.gov.pk, where the notice is also available.

4. Bidding will be conducted through the Request for Quotations procedure as specified in the World Bank "Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers" July 2016 (Revised Nov 2017 and August 2018.

5. Quotations must be delivered to the following address on or before 17 July 2026 at 16:00 PM PST. Late quotations will be rejected.

6. Submission of quotations in electronic format is not allowed. Quotations must be submitted through physical means.

 

Project Coordinator,

SELECT, PMIU

Reform Support Unit School Education & Literacy Department,

Government of Sindh,

47-E/1, Street No. 48, PECHS Block-6, Near Nursery Furniture Market, Shahrah-e-Faisal, Karachi.

E-mail: pmiuselect.seld@gmail.com, info@rsu.sindh.gov.pk,

Website: https://rsu-sindh.gov.pk 

Tel: 021-34304441

Grievance Redressal Mechanism No. 021-111-753-328
